lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner used to validate the multirole slot fit, jump range and cargo figures for this ship.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Diamondback Explorer ship page — manufacturer, hardpoint/feature overview, and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Authoritative hardpoint sizes, optional-internal slots, hull mass and core stats backing the specgrid and peer tables.

sources.label: Inara — Diamondback Explorer
sources.what: Ship overview cross-checked for internals layout, hardpoints, hull price and shipyard availability used in the multipurpose write-up.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous Wiki
sources.what: Diamondback Explorer lore, manufacturer and design notes (range, heat profile) informing the role overview.

sources.label: YouTube — Ricardos Gaming
sources.what: Opinionated review of the Diamondback Explorer's strengths and limits as an affordable, flexible hull beyond pure exploration.
